checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue #260 authorized bounded v2 release-readiness hardening, additive tests, docs/context updates, one normal non-force v2 push, CI evidence, and v1 evidence files. The final report records those outcomes.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The v2 repo has release-readiness contract and scope files, VERSION, readiness artifact, release/rollback docs, unicode-escaped property-name validation, rooted/traversal forbidden_paths rejection, operation whitespace rejection, T25-T33 tests, pushed commit 1c1def8aa349fa896100bc395702b764c1ede355, local tests passing, and CI passing.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The work stayed inside declared v1 evidence files and declared v2 implementation/docs/test/context files. It did not access secrets, install dependencies, deploy, change production, billing, auth, authorization, database, external AI providers, hosted runtime, MCP mutation, repository visibility, CI workflow security, force push, or branch deletion.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: No credentials, keys, production settings, auth, billing, database, deployment, or destructive infrastructure were touched. The only remote mutation was the authorized normal non-force push to v2 origin/master after local tests passed.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: All v1 evidence files are declared in the issue #260 scope manifest. The v2 changed files match the external paths declared in the execution contract and the v2 release-readiness scope.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: SpecBridge v2 local tests passed with 231 passed and 0 failed after Codex corrected the weak T27 fixture. v2 git diff --check and touched-file ASCII/no-BOM scan passed.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub Actions run 28145621712 for v2 workflow CI completed successfully on 1c1def8aa349fa896100bc395702b764c1ede355. The v1 evidence branch has not been opened as a PR, so v1 merge CI is not collected.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records the Claude-first implementation, Codex repair of T27 and rollback docs, successful local tests, successful push, successful CI, the v1 merge gate, and residual risks.

findings.evidence: The v1 evidence branch has not been opened as a PR and therefore has no GitHub CI or review gate for merge into main.
findings.recommendation: Open a v1 PR for the evidence branch and merge only after required gates pass and operator merge authority is explicit.

findings.evidence: The v2 release-readiness artifact records static MVP readiness; runtime operation enforcement remains future scope.
findings.recommendation: Implement runtime operation enforcement under a future dedicated contract if v2 grows beyond static validation.

unresolved_risks: V1 evidence is not merged into main.
specbridge-v2 master is not branch-protected due GitHub plan/private visibility limitation.
Runtime operation enforcement remains future scope.
CI action SHA pinning remains future CI workflow hardening scope.
